speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere kandhon par parivaar ko phir se khada karne ka bojh hai
text: Jab usne kaha ki shehar aakar main badal gaya hoon, toh mujhe laga wo gaon ki baadh mein sab kuch kho dene ka dard nahi samjhti. Mere kandhon par parivaar ko phir se khada karne ka bojh hai, isliye thakan chahe jitni ho, main rukkne ka risk nahi le sakta. Remittance har mahine bhejni hi padegi kyunki mere rukkne ka matlab hai poore khandaan ki haar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame to make the seeker feel heard.
text: Tumhare kandhon par parivaar ko wapas khada karne ka bahut bada bojh hai, aur tum chahte hue bhi khud ke thakan ko nahi dekh sakte kyunki ghar par paisa bhejna zaroori hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: remittance har mahine bhejni hi padegi
text: Haan, bilkul. Gaon mein baadh ne aisi tabahi machayi ki khet sab doob gaye. Ab Mumbai mein double shift karni padti hai. Koi choice nahi hai mere paas, bas kaam aur paisa bhejna.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the duration and constant pressure of the work.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise jab se baadh aayi hai, tumhara ek ek din sirf double shift aur kharcha bhejne mein nikal raha hai, bina kisi chhutti ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Chhutti ka soch bhi nahi sakta. Agar main aaraam karunga, toh khandaan bhookha marega. Par kabhi kabhi itna akela lagta hai is bheed wale shehar mein... lagta hai main sirf ek ATM machine ban gaya hoon. Par yeh sab kisi ko bol nahi sakta, izzat ka sawaal hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond softly to the stigma cue with a gentle pause.
text: Apno se door is bheed mein tumhe khud ko ek ATM ki tarah mehsoos karna pad raha hai, aur yeh baat tum andar hi andar dabakar rakh rahe ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere kandhon par parivaar ko phir se khada karne ka bojh hai
text: Dabana hi padta hai. Gaon walon ko lagta hai shehar mein main aish kar raha hoon. Wo taane maarte hain. Par haqeeqat yeh hai ki mere kandhon par parivaar ko phir se khada karne ka bojh hai, aur yahan ki life kitni tough hai wo unhe nahi samajh aayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the mismatch between his reality and his family's perception.
text: Yeh taane sunkar, jab tum itni mehnat se apna farz nibha rahe ho, toh us waqt andar se kya mehsoos hota hai tumhe?

speaker: Seeker
text: Gussa aata hai, sach kahun toh. Phir khud par sharm aati hai ki main apne hi ghar walo par gussa kar raha hoon. Wo bhi toh kitni problem mein hain. Main yahan hoon, kam az kam safely so toh raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the guilt and fear of being ungrateful.
text: Ek taraf unka taana chubhta hai, aur doosri taraf lagta hai ki agar maine unse narazgi dikhayi, toh kahin unhe aur dard na pahunche.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: remittance har mahine bhejni hi padegi
text: Sahi pakda aapne. Unko aur takleef nahi de sakta. Isliye chup chap remittance har mahine bhejni hi padegi. Meri thakan ki unhe kya padi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the deep exhaustion tied to the duty.
text: Lagta hai itne waqt se sirf doosron ka dhyaan rakhte rakhte andar se ek bahut gehari thakan baith gayi hai, jisko baantne wala yahan koi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baantne ka time hi kahan milta hai? Room pe aao, khana banao, so jao, phir wahi double shift. Kabhi lagta hai aise hi ghut ghut ke ek din khatam ho jaunga. Par fir behen ki shadi ka khyaal aa jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the mild risk and normalise his fatigue.
text: Dabaav mein is hadh tak thak jana ki sab kuch chhod dene ka mann kare, yeh aisi akelepan aur itni mehnat ke baad bahut swabhavik hai. Tumhara poora wajood apne parivaar ki zindagi banane mein laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Swabhavik ho sakta hai, par iska end kahan hai? Kab tak main aise hi machine ki tarah chalta rahunga bina rukkne ka risk liye? Mujhe bhi kabhi kabhi insaan hone ka feel karna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote to reduce isolation.
text: Dusre shehar aakar paisa kamane wale bohot se logon mein yeh duty ka bojh aur apne insaan hone ka ehsaas bhool jana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka struggle nahi hai, lekin gaon mein koi bolega nahi kyunki sab mard se sirf ummeed lagate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai... Mard hone ka, bada beta hone ka saara karz mujh par hi hai. Main fail nahi ho sakta, warna baadh ka paani hamare parivaar ko waqai le doobega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the fear of disappointing the family.
text: Lagta hai tumhe har waqt ye darr satata hai ki agar tum thoda bhi rukk gaye, toh tumhara parivaar phir se us tabahi ka shikaar ho jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wahi darr toh meri neend uda deta hai. Ab pata nahi, mujhe thoda theek hona hai, thoda dimag shant karna hai. Batao kya karoon main is routine mein?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide small, actionable suggestions that fit his routine.
text: Is bheed-bhaad aur kaam ke beech mein, kuch choti cheezein try kar sakte hain. Ek toh jab tum duty ke liye nikalte ho, us safar mein sirf apne gaane sun sakte ho jo tumhe pasand hain. Doosra, sone se 5 minute pehle sirf ek lamba saans lene ka routine rakh sakte ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Gaane sunna toh main bhool hi gaya tha Mumbai aake. Gaon mein khet ke raste kitna sunta tha. Yeh saans lene wala kaise karna hai? Main koshish kar sakta hoon sone se pehle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through one small step clearly.
text: Pehle aaj raat bistar par letna... phir aanhken band karke 3 tak ginte hue lambi saans andar lena, aur 4 tak ginte hue dheere dheere chhodna... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, 3 tak andar, 4 tak bahar. Yeh toh aasan lag raha hai. Mujhe waise bhi neend aane mein bahut time lagta hai, khayalo mein khoya rehta hoon. Yeh try karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize structural pressure.
text: Yaad rakhna, yeh jo pressure tum mehsus kar rahe ho, yeh koi tumhari personal kamzori nahi hai. Jab poora parivaar baadh jaisi dikkat se guzar raha ho, tab akele insaan par system ka laya hua structural dabav bohot zyada hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere kandhon par parivaar ko phir se khada karne ka bojh hai
text: Haa, system ka khel hi hai sab. Agar baadh mein sahara milta, toh main yahan double shift na kar raha hota. Par chalo, mere kandhon par parivaar ko phir se khada karne ka bojh hai, isko main utha toh raha hi hoon, ab khud ko thoda time bhi dunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge his integration of the duty and small care step.
text: Apni poori zimmedari poori mehnat se uthane ke saath saath, ab tumne apne liye bhi choti si raahat ka rasta nikala hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kuch raahat toh zaroori hai bhaiya. Roz aise daudte raho toh insaan toot hi jayega na ek din.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about how he feels imagining this small relief.
text: Soch kar kaisa lag raha hai ki ab local train ke safar mein tumhare kano mein wapas tumhare pasandida gaane sunayi denge?

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda achha lag raha hai. Earphones toh bag mein hi padhe rehte the, aaj nikalunga. Wapas room tak aate aate thoda dimaag thanda rahega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the subtle positive shift in his plan.
text: Ghar wapas aate waqt ka safar, jo pehle thakan aur tension mein guzarta tha, wo ab tumhare liye halka hone ka ek zariya banne wala hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Aur uske baad raat ko wo saans lene wala rule. Mujhe lagta hai main theek se so paaunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his commitment to the steps.
text: Din bhar ki lumbi mehnat ke aakhir mein apni neend ko behter banane ka tumne yeh faisla liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Neend acchi hogi toh hi agle din duty theek se ho payegi. Warna gaon paise kaise jayenge, unka dhyan kon rakhega mere siva.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect that the core motivation is still duty but with self-sustenance.
text: Lagta hai tumhe is baat se takat mil rahi hai ki thoda apna khayal rakhne se tum apne parivaar ke liye apni zimmewari aur behtar dhang se utha paoge.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: remittance har mahine bhejni hi padegi
text: Haan, machine ko bhi toh tel pani chahiye hota hai chalne ke liye. Remittance har mahine bhejni hi padegi, par is baar main toot ke nahi bhejunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm his shift from broken to managing.
text: Tumhari mehnat waqai bohot badi hai, aur tootne ke bajaye, khud ko iss chhoti raahat ke zariye thoda sambhal lena, yeh bhi ek bade farz ka hissa ban gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya bhai. Aaj kisi se aise bina jhijhak ke baat kar li toh dil ka aada weight to waise hi kam ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close gently acknowledging the conversation.
text: Bas andar ka bojh thoda halka hone diya tumne, aur ye dikh raha hai ki aaj tum ek thodi behtar aur shant subah ki aasha rakh rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main chalta hoon ab. Naha dhokar phir duty ka time ho jayega. Gaane sunte hue jaunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: A warm concluding question maintaining the connection.
text: Duty par dhyan se jana, aur agar aur kuch baat karni ho safar ke bare mein ya aage, toh main yahan hoon, theek hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dharma hai ki main is metro isolation mein bhi sirf kamai par dhyan doon
text: Partner ki baatein chubhi toh bohot, par mere paas emotions ke liye waqt kahan hai jab ghar aag mein raakh ho gaya aur government ki apathy ne humein sadak par la diya. Ek first-gen urban migrant hone ke naate mera dharma hai ki main is metro isolation mein bhi sirf kamai par dhyan doon. Mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai kyunki mere rukkne se gaon mein sab bhookhe mar jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame first, acknowledging the immense pressure to earn.
text: Tumhari baaton se saaf lag raha hai ki poore parivaar ko aag ki tabahi se nikalne ki badi zimmedari tum par hai, isliye khud ko machine samajhna tumhari majboori ban gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai
text: Majboori toh hai ji. Gaon mein sarkar ne kuch madad nahi ki. Bada beta hoon, sab ummeed lagaye baithe hain. Yahan Mumbai ke is bheed mein roz dhabe pe khata hoon, thekedaar ki gaali sunta hoon, par mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai. Koi aur chara nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the fear of the consequences if he stops.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki andar hi andar ek darr baitha hua hai ki agar tumne thekedaar ki baatein dil par li ya aaram kiya, toh peeche gaon mein tumhara parivaar bikhar jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bilkul... aur upar se partner kahta hai ki main pathar ban gaya hoon, mujhe feelings nahi hain. Ab unhe kaise samjhaoon ki main agar feelings pe dhyan dunga, toh mera dharma kon nibhayega? Structural endurance ke bina ek first-gen migrant survive hi nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational element (partner's words vs his reality).
text: Apne partner ki baatein sunkar aur bhi akelapan lagta hoga, kyunki unhe tumhara pathar banna ek kami lagti hai, jabki tumhare liye yeh parivaar ko bachane ka iklauta rasta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda aapne. Unhe lagta hai main badal gaya hoon. Par kisi ko apne aansu dikhaunga toh log kamzor bolenge. Ek mard rote hue thodi na achha lagta hai, khaas kar jab sab uspe dependent hon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue with a soft, shortened restatement ending in a pause.
text: Sabka bojh uthane ke dharam mein apne hi aansu dabane padte hain, kyunki samaj ek mard ko tootne ki ijazat nahi deta...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dharma hai ki main is metro isolation mein bhi sirf kamai par dhyan doon
text: Wahi baat hai. Izat ka bojh aur ye metro isolation, dono milkar andar se kha rahe hain. Har jagah itni bheed hai, phir bhi lagta hai mera koi apna yahan nahi hai. Bas mera dharma hai ki main is metro isolation mein bhi sirf kamai par dhyan doon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the deep exhaustion and isolation hiding behind the duty.
text: Lagta hai is lagatar kamai ke chakkar mein aur khud ko mazboot dikhane mein, andar se ek bahut gehari thakan aur akelapan chha gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thakan itni hai ki kabhi kabhi subah thekedaar ki whistle sun kar lagta hai uthu hi nahi. So jau hamesha ke liye. Par phir wahi khet ke jalne ki yaad aati hai aur main uth khada hota hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalise the mild risk flag and validate the exhaustion from a cultural lens.
text: Subah uthne ki himmat na hona aur sab chhod dene ka khayal aana ekdum swabhavik hai. Jab sarkar aur halaat ne tumhe is kadar majboor kar diya ho, toh ek first-gen migrant ka itna tootna aur thakna bahut laazmi baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap meri jagah samajh rahe ho. Yahan shehar mein sab bas apni duniya mein hain. Main gaon ki mitti se aaya hoon, wahan toh pareshani bant li jati thi. Yahan kamre mein chaar log aur hain, par koi kisika dard nahi jaanta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the contrast between village community and metro isolation.
text: Ek samay tha jab gaon mein apna dukh dardo ka saathi mil jata tha, par ab lambe waqt se is shehar ke bhari kamre mein bhi tum khud ko poori tarah akela mehsus kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dharma hai ki main is metro isolation mein bhi sirf kamai par dhyan doon
text: Akela hi toh laya tha apne parivaar ki zimmewari. Partner se hi umeed thi, par unhone bhi taana maar diya. Theek hi hai, mera dharma hai ki main is metro isolation mein bhi sirf kamai par dhyan doon, chahe kuch bhi ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore how he processes the hurt from the partner.
text: Jab jisse sabse zyada umeed thi wahan se taana milta hai, aur tum wapas sirf apne duty wale kirdar mein laut aate ho, toh us waqt dil mein kya chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai
text: Lagta hai jaisi gaon ki aag thi, waise hi andar kuch jal raha hai. Par main saans le kar khud ko samjhata hoon ki in cheezon par dhyan dene ka luxury mere paas nahi hai. Mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about migrant workers masking feelings.
text: Migrant mardon mein khud ki andar ki aag ko daba kar srif paise kamane ko hi apna sab kuch maan lena bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin shehar aakar log bolenge nahi kyunki izzat aur parivaar dono ki chinta hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein. Pehli baar kisi ne meri majboori ko mere angle se dekha. Sabko lagta hai main selfish hoon jo sirf paise ginta hoon, par agar na ginu toh ghar kaise chalega? Ab aap hi batao, is situation mein theek kaise ho sakta hoon main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, actionable steps that don't add to his burden.
text: Is bhaari zimmedari ke beech, kuch chhoti cheezein ho sakti hain. Ek toh din mein jab khana khate waqt akele hote ho, toh 5 minute bina phone ke khud ki thakan ko mehsoos karke lambi saans lena, ya apne partner ko ek chhota voice note bhejna jismein sirf itna bata sako ki tum thake hue ho, jhagde ke bina.

speaker: Seeker
text: Khana khate waqt saans lene wala toh kar sakta hoon. Partner ko voice note bhejne mein thoda darr lagta hai ki pata nahi kya jawab aaye. Par 5 minute khud ko dena shayad aasaan hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the breathing step clearly.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki kal dhabe par jab khane ki plate aaye, toh khane se pehle aankh band karke 3 deep saans lena aur bolna ki main aaj mehnat kar raha hoon... phir khana shuru karna... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dharma hai ki main is metro isolation mein bhi sirf kamai par dhyan doon
text: Theek hai. Ye simple lag raha hai. Mujhe waise bhi apne dharma se peeche nahi hatna. Kamai toh karni hi hai, par khate waqt ek do saans lena mujhe rukne ka ehsaas nahi karayega, bas thodi shanti dega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize his struggle as a systemic issue, not a personal flaw.
text: Dhyan rakhna, yeh jo poora bojh tum utha rahe ho, ye isliye nahi ki tum pathar ho, balki isliye kyunki government apathy ne aur halaat ne ek urban migrant par survival ka itna bada pahaad gira diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai
text: Aapki baaton ne ekdum se dil ka wezan kam kar diya. Main soche jaa raha tha ki mere andar hi koi kami hai. Par sach toh yahi hai ki government ne agar dhyan diya hota toh mujhe ek machine ki tarah chalte rehne ki zaroorat nahi hoti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his realization of the systemic burden vs personal failure.
text: Khud par dosh daalne ka darr ab kam ho raha hai, kyunki tum dekh paa rahe ho ki kami tumhare andar nahi, balki un halaton mein hai jinhone tumhe ye raasta chunne par majboor kiya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Jee bilkul. Yeh halaat hain jo aisi majboori laate hain. Partner ko bhi main dhire dhire samjhane ki koshish karunga ki mere chup rehne ka matlab yeh nahi ki main unki parwah nahi karta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge his tentative plan regarding his partner.
text: Apne partner ke saath thoda wapas judne ka ye ek chhota sa raasta tum soch rahe ho, jahan bina lafzon ke ladai ke unko apni majboori samjha sako.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, dhire dhire. Pehle apna dhyaan rakh lun thoda. Khane ke waqt wali deep saans toh main roz karna shuru karunga. Dekhte hain usse thoda sukoon milta hai ya nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm his small step towards himself.
text: Ye chhoti si shuruaat aage chalkar tumhe thakan aur pressure sehne ki thodi aur takat degi, bina tumhari mehnat aur duty mein rukaawat daale.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dharma hai ki main is metro isolation mein bhi sirf kamai par dhyan doon
text: Duty sabse upar hai, aur mera dharma hai ki main is metro isolation mein bhi sirf kamai par dhyan doon. Par aapne samjhaya ki apne saans lene se wo duty aur behtar ho payegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his integration of duty with small self-care.
text: Apne parivaar ko bachaane ke itne bade maksad ke beech, ab tumne apni andar ki thakan ko bhi halka karne ka ek hissa bana liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai
text: Bilkul. Ek dum se machine ki battery recharge karne jaisa. Ab mujhe utni chinta nahi hai is baat ki ki main galat hoon, mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai magar thoda dhyaan se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the shift from burdened exhaustion to empowered calmness.
text: Lagta hai khud ko kamzor na samajhne se andar ka bojh kaafi utar gaya hai aur ab aage ka raasta thoda aur shaant lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shaant toh hoon ab thoda. Raat mein achhi neend aayegi aaj mujhe. Aur kal naye sire se construction site jaunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge his readiness for the next day.
text: Kal jab naya din shuru hoga, toh wahi site aur wahi mehnat hogi, par ek nai himmat ke sath.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bhai. Bohat shukriya sunne ke liye. Hum logon ki baat sunne wala shehar mein koi kahan hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question to wrap up warmly.
text: Aaj ki is baatcheet ne tumhe thodi rahat di, kya aage bhi aise hi apna haal baantne ke liye tayyar hoge jab zyada dabaav mahsoos ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Zaroor karunga. Mujhe pata hai mujhe strong rehna hai par ab malum chal gaya ki akele rona zaruri nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validating closing.
text: Tumne apni duty aur khud ko lekar bahut badi samajh dikhayi hai aaj, parivaar ko sambhalte hue ab tum khud ko bhi achhe se sambhal paoge.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni mental health neglect karke bas endurance dikha raha hoon
text: Shehar ki bheed mein jab usne badlav ka taana mara, toh mera dil baith gaya par maine bas endurance dikhayi kyunki disaster ne hamari biradari ko tabaah kar diya hai. Main thak kar choor hoon par starting over ke liye bhasha ka gap aur akelepan jhelte huye bhi kaam karna hi hai. Zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni mental health neglect karke bas endurance dikha raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame and the burden of starting over.
text: Tumhare kandhon par apni biradari aur parivaar ko wapas khada karne ka itna bada kaam hai ki tumhe apne dukh aur thakan ko side mein rakh kar bas majbooti dikhani pad rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni mental health neglect karke bas endurance dikha raha hoon
text: Aur koi raasta bhi toh nahi hai na. Jab sab kuch khatam ho gaya gaon mein, toh yahan Mumbai aakar dobara shuru karna mazak thodi hai. Zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni mental health neglect karke bas endurance dikha raha hoon, par andar se toot chuka hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and constant struggle since the disaster.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki jab se gaon mein sab tabaah hua hai, tab se lekar ab tak ka har ek din bina ruke, bina aaram kiye sirf mehnat mein guzar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Din raat sirf kaam. Yahan ki bhasha theek se aati nahi, log ajeeb nazar se dekhte hain. Ghar wale samajhte hain main shehar mein aish kar raha hoon aur unhone taana bhi maar diya. Kisi se bol nahi sakta ki yahan akela rote hue sota hoon, log kya kahenge ki mard hokar ro raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue softly.
text: Apno se taane sunna aur is naye shehar mein akele apne aansu dabana, kyunki samaj mard ko kamzor hone ki ijazat nahi deta...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni mental health neglect karke bas endurance dikha raha hoon
text: Sahi kaha. Ijazat kahan hai? Agar main tut gaya toh unka kya hoga jo mere paise ka intezar kar rahe hain? Isiliye toh zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni mental health neglect karke bas endurance dikha raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the internal feeling behind the endurance.
text: Jab tum itni koshish aur majbooti se apne parivaar ka dhyan rakh rahe ho, aur badle mein unka taana chubhta hai, toh andar se kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dukh toh bahut hota hai. Jaise andar kuch jal raha ho. Par phir lagta hai ki unki bhi halat kharab hai gaon mein, wo bhi frustration mein bol dete hain. Main unse naraz bhi nahi ho sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of getting angry.
text: Apne dukh ke bawajood, tumhe shayed ye darr lagta hai ki agar tumne apni narazgi dikhayi toh kahin pehle se pareshan tumhare parivaar ko aur takleef na pahunche.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haa, unhe takleef mein dekhna mujhse bardaasht nahi hoga. Is chakkar mein, yahan Mumbai ki is anjaan jagah mein mera ghut-ghut ke jeena chal raha hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod-chhad ke kahin gayab ho jaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the profound exhaustion and desire to escape the burden.
text: Lagta hai lagatar sabko sambhalte hue aur khud ko anjaan shehar mein bhula dene se aisi thakan aa chuki hai ki ab tumhara mann is sab se bhaag jane ko karta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni mental health neglect karke bas endurance dikha raha hoon
text: Bhaag kar jaunga bhi kahan? Biradari walon ka chehra yaad aa jata hai. Starting over bohot mushkil hai. Isliye bhaagne ka khayal bas khayal hi reh jata hai aur zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni mental health neglect karke bas endurance dikha raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalise the exhaustion and validate his sacrifice.
text: Jab koi itni badi tabaahi ke baad apne pure khandaan ko wapas khada karne ki zimmewari akele uthata hai, toh us waqt sab chhodne ka khayal aana aur andar se poori tarah thak jana ekdum normal baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap meri jagah theek se samajh rahe ho. Yahan sab itne ameer aur tez hain, mera bhasha ka gap mujhe aur piche dhakel deta hai. Main unki tarah nahi ban pa raha, aur gaon walon ko lagta hai main badal gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote of a migrant in similar situations.
text: Naye shehar mein aakar kaam karne wale mardon mein ye bhasha ka darr aur ghar walo se doori ka dard bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sabko apna farz nibhane ki padi hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha... Par aise kab tak chalega? Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki main apni yeh endurance kab tak bacha ke rakh paunga. Mujhe batao kya karoon main thoda theek mehsoos karne ke liye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide culturally fitting small options for relief.
text: Is bhari zimmedari ke beech, tum apne liye kuch choti cheezein try kar sakte ho. Ek toh sone se 5 minute pehle aankhein band karke kuch lambi saans lena, ya din mein kisi ek waqt, shayad chai peete hue, bina kisi duty ke sirf apne aas-paas ki hawa mehsus karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Chai peete waqt 5 minute mil toh jate hain. Par saans lena... yeh kaise karna hoga? Dimag toh chalta hi rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the breathing exercise clearly.
text: Pehle aankh band karna jab chai hath mein ho... phir 3 tak ginte hue lambi saans andar lena, aur 4 tak ginte hue us saans ko dheere dheere bahar chhodna... bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karke dekho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh aasaan lag raha hai. Agar dimag us waqt kuch na soche toh thoda sukoon shayad mil jaye. Kal dopahar ki chai par pakka koshish karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe about the disaster and burden.
text: Dhyan rakhna, ye jo thakan tumhe feel ho rahi hai ye tumhari kamzori nahi hai, balki ye ek aisi tragedy ka nateeja hai jiske aage akele insaan par recovery ka saara bojh aa gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni mental health neglect karke bas endurance dikha raha hoon
text: Bojh toh waqai bada hai. Tabahi sab kuch chheen leti hai, insaan ko ek machine bana deti hai. Zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni mental health neglect karke bas endurance dikha raha hoon, par ab samajh raha hoon ki chai wala 5 minute jaroori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his integration of self-care with duty.
text: Apni biradari ko sambhalne ke is bade kaam mein, ab tumne apne andar ki thakan ko halka karne ka ek chhota aur sacha raasta chuna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main kar sakta hoon. Aakhir wo 5 minute mujhe aage kaam karne ki aur takat hi denge na. Main nahi toot sakta, unke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about how he feels planning this small relief.
text: Ye soch kar kaisa lag raha hai ki kal ki bheed bhari duty ke beech, wo chai ka waqt sirf tumhara aur tumhare sukoon ka hoga?

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda achha lag raha hai soch kar. Aise chhote break se shayad mera dimaag thoda shant rahe, aur main taanon ko bhi better handle kar paun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the anticipated positive impact.
text: Tumhe mehsoos ho raha hai ki ye chhota sa thehrav aage chal kar tumhe apni pareshaniyon aur ghar walon ke gusse ka bojh uthane mein madad karega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zaroor karega. Aap se baat karke aaj mera dimaag sach mein thoda halka hua hai. Pehle toh bas andhera hi lag raha tha aage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his courage to talk and find a step forward.
text: Tumne itne andhere aur akelepan ke baad bhi apni baat kehne ki himmat dikhayi, ye apne aap mein ek bohot badi mazbooti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dhyaan rakhne ke liye shukriya. Main abhi nikalta hoon kaam ke liye. Par kal zaroor chai peete hue aapki batayi exercise karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his commitment to the step.
text: Ek lambe thakawat wale safar mein, tumne kal ke din apne aaram ke liye ye ek chhota pal mukarrar kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bilkul. Chalo, ab mujhe duty ke liye der ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the renewed sense of duty infused with slight relief.
text: Lagta hai apna haal batane ke baad ab tum thodi halki saans ke sath wapas kaam par jane ke liye taiyar ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni mental health neglect karke bas endurance dikha raha hoon
text: Haa bhai. Bhale hi zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni mental health neglect karke bas endurance dikha raha hoon, par ab main ek machine nahi banunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validating statement.
text: Tumhara apne aap ko aur apne farz dono ko sambhalne ka yeh kadam waqai taareef ke kabil hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Khayal rakhna apna bhi aap. Milte hain phir kabhi agar time mila.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the parting connection.
text: Apne naye safar ke beech, ab tumko malum hai ki zaroorat padne par tumhe ek sunne wala mil sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zaroor. Shukriya madad aur waqt ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close with a warm, open connection query.
text: Aaj ki baat chit ke baad, agar kabhi aage bhi man bhaari ho, toh yaad se wapas aoge na?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Jab usne kaha main 'metro lifestyle' mein kho gaya hoon, toh maine kuch nahi kaha kyunki usse kya pata ki main yahan akelepan mein kaise har rupaya bacha kar remittance bhej raha hoon. Rebuilding ka pressure itna hai ki main afford nahi kar sakta ki main bimar padun ya rukun. Mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai aur main bas ek structural endurance mein jee raha hoon taaki parivaar ki 'izzat' bani rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame and the burden of remittance.
text: Tumhare upar ghar ki izzat aur parivaar ko wapas khada karne ka itna bada bojh hai ki tumhe lagta hai tumhare paas rukne ya thakne ka koi haq hi nahi bacha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main afford nahi kar sakta ki main bimar padun ya rukun
text: Haq ki toh baat hi chhod dijiye. Mumbai ki is bheed mein roz akele nikalta hoon, construction site pe dhool phankta hoon, aur gaon mein unko lagta hai main yahan mazze kar raha hoon. Main afford nahi kar sakta ki main bimar padun ya rukun, warna wahan chulha nahi jalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of him stopping.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki andar hi andar yeh darr hamesha rehta hai ki agar tumne thoda bhi aaram liya, toh gaon mein tumhare apne bhookhe reh jayenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bhookhe toh marenge hi na. Aur upar se unke taane sun kar dil baith jata hai. Kabhi kabhi akeli kothri mein rone ka mann karta hai, par socho mard hokar aise rounga toh biradari mein kya muh dikhaunga. Isliye aansu pee jata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue softly.
text: Apno ki baaton se dil dukhta hai, par samaj ke darr se tum apne aansu akele kamre mein bhi daba dete ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Dabana hi padta hai. Mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai ab. Gaon ki yaad bahut aati hai, khet, apne log... par ab sab tabaah ho gaya hai. Mujhe lagta hai maine apni pehchaan hi kho di hai is metro isolation mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying grief of losing belonging and identity.
text: Lagta hai ki sabko sambhalte sambhalte aur ghar ki izzat bachate hue, tumhare andar ek gehra dukh baith gaya hai kyunki tumhe apna gaon aur apni asli pehchaan chhootne ka ehsas hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut gehra dukh hai. Yahan koi mera naam se bhi nahi bulata, bas 'oye bhaiya' keh kar kaam par laga dete hain. Aur wahan gaon mein, jiske liye main ye sab seh raha hoon, unhe lagta hai main yahan aish kar raha hoon. Ye soch kar bohot akelapan lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore the pain of this misunderstanding.
text: Jab tum yahan itni mehnat karke apni pehchaan bhula chuke ho, aur wahan se aish karne ka taana aata hai, toh us akelepan mein khud ko kaise sambhalte ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Sambhalna kya, bas agle din uth kar wapas site par chala jata hoon. Koi aur rasta nahi hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai is building ke pillar mein hi meri laash dab jayegi aur kisi ko pata bhi nahi chalega. Par phir remittance ki yaad aati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the mild risk and validate his cultural struggle.
text: Is bheed-bhaad wale shehar mein khud ko itna akela mehsoos karna ki sab khatam hone ka khayal aaye, ye aisi halat mein bahut swabhavik hai jab ek migrant apni poori zindagi sirf apne parivaar ke liye jhonk deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Jhonk hi di hai zindagi. Mujhe yaad bhi nahi aakhiri baar maine apne liye kab kuch socha tha. Parivaar ki izzat bachane mein main khud mitti ban gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share systemic reality of migrant duty.
text: Apna ghar chhod kar aane wale logon mein apne farz ke aage khud ki zaruraton ko mita dena bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin yahan anjaan shehar mein koi bolega nahi kyunki sabke kandhon par ghar ka bojh hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Sach baat hai. Yahan kothri mein sab meri tarah hi hain. Sab remittance ke liye aaye hain. Lekin main is ghutan ke saath aur nahi chal paunga roj. Mujhe batao kya karoon ki thoda dimaag shant rahe?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide small, viable coping options matching his setting.
text: Is lagatar kaam aur dabaav ke beech, do chhoti cheezein ho sakti hain. Ek toh site par lunch ke baad 5 minute akele baith kar apni aati-jaati saans par dhyan dena, ya phir sone se pehle gaon ki koi acchi yaad jo purani ho, usko yaad karke so jana.

speaker: Seeker
text: Gaon ki yaad se shayad nind thodi better aa jaye. Lunch ke waqt toh bohot shor hota hai site pe. Raat mein sone se pehle apni saans pe dhyan dene wali baat main kar sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the breathing exercise.
text: Pehle aaj raat chatai par lette waqt aankh band karna... phir 3 tak ginte hue andar saans lena, aur 4 tak ginte hue dheere dheere use bahar chhodna... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, yeh samajh aa gaya. Saans lete waqt main koshish karunga ki main gaon ke taano ke baare mein na sochu. Bas thodi shanti chahye mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide structural reframe.
text: Hamesha dhyan rakhna ki yeh metro isolation aur taane tumhari koi personal kami nahi hain. Yeh us poore system ka hissa hai jahan ek akele insaan par gaon rebuilding ka pura pressure daal diya jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Sahi keh rahe ho aap. System hi aesa hai. Mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai aur main ye kar raha hoon, iska mujhe garv hona chahiye na ki sharm. Akele hoon par kamzor nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his newfound pride in his duty.
text: Apni poori zimmedari poori lagan se uthate hue ab tum apne farz ko ek garv ke roop mein dekh rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Garv toh hai. Main janta hoon main wahan ke liye kya kar raha hoon, bhale wo na samjhe. Main kal unse phone par normal baat karne ki koshish karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore his feelings about this plan.
text: Soch kar kaisa lag raha hai ki ab tum unse baat karte waqt taano ko apne dil par haavi nahi hone doge?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot halka lag raha hai. Main taane isliye mehsoos karta tha kyunki main khud ko akelepan mein unki baato se define kar raha tha. Ab nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his shift away from relational damage.
text: Tumhare apno ke kahe gaye un chubhne wale shabdon ka asar ab kam ho raha hai, kyunki tumne apni asli mehnat ko pehchaan liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main afford nahi kar sakta ki main bimar padun ya rukun
text: Haa bhai. Main afford nahi kar sakta ki main bimar padun ya rukun, isliye dimaag ko shant rakhna sabse zaruri hai. Saans wala tarika pakka try karunga raat ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge his integration of the duty with self-care.
text: Parivaar ki zimmewari poori karne ke is irade mein, ab tumne thoda waqt apne dimaag ko aaram dene ke liye bhi jod liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaram toh karna hi padega, warna machine kharab ho jayegi na. Aaj aapse baat karke andar ka dukh kafi kam hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his courage and resilience.
text: Tumhari mehnat waqai bohot badi hai, aur itne andhere mein bhi apne andar ki taakat ko pehchaan kar aage badhna sach mein tarif ke kabil hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sukriya aapka. Sach mein kisi se aise baat karne ka mauka nahi milta. Yahan toh sab bhagte hi rehte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his relief in connection.
text: Lambi thakan aur is tej raftaar shehar ki bheed mein aaj tumne apne dil ki baat baantne ke liye ek waqt nikal liya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Haan, aur aage bhi nikalunga waqt khud ke liye. Mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai, magar main insaan bhi toh hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the shift from mere duty to balanced self-awareness.
text: Lagta hai ab tum apne farz ke sath-sath apni khud ki ahemiyat aur apne insaan hone ke ehsas se judi hui shanti mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Chalo ab main thoda fresh ho kar aage ki shift ki tayari karta hoon. Raat mein wo rule pakka lagaunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his readiness for the next step.
text: Pehle jo aage ka kaam ek pahad lagta tha, ab tum thodi halki saans ke sath us shift par jane ke liye taiyar lag rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdam tayyar hoon. Aap apna khayal rakhna. Aapse baat karke sach mein bohot badlav laga andar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final affirmation of his agency.
text: Tumhari apni samajh aur himmat ne is badlav ko mumkin banaya hai, tum is shanti ke haqdaar ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya bhai. Yaad rakhunga aapki baatein. Alvida.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Warm close inviting future contact.
text: Alvida, aur jab bhi akelepan ya duty ka bojh zyada lagne lage, toh kya phir se aise baat karne ka waqt nikaloge?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Disaster mein sab kho dene ke baad shehar aana koi shauk nahi, majboori thi, par jab usne mere badle huye svabhav ka mazaak udaya toh main sunn reh gaya. Main exhausted hoon par mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai kyunki poore gaon ko mujhse umeed hai ki main metro city mein settle hokar unki madad karunga. Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai kyunki mera endurance hi mere bimar maa-baap ki aakhri umeed hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame and the burden of family expectations.
text: Tumhari baaton se saaf jhalak raha hai ki bimar maa-baap aur poore gaon ki itni badi umeed tumhare kandhon par tiki hai, jiski wajah se exhaustion hone par bhi tum apne aaram ke baare mein soch nahi paa rahe.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Sahi baat hai. Mere paas option hi kahan hai? Jab poora ghar aur gaon disaster mein beh gaya, tab shehar aana hi aakhri rasta tha. Aur ab jab yahan thoda theek se settle hone ki koshish kar raha hoon, toh log mazaak uda rahe hain. Par mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai. Main bas structural endurance dikha kar chal raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and constant struggle since the disaster.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise disaster ke baad se lekar aaj tak, is shehar mein tumne ek lamba waqt bina saans liye bas majbooti dikhane mein guzaar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ek arsa ho gaya hai. Kabhi kabhi is metro city ki bheed mein itna isolation feel hota hai, lagta hai koi mera apna nahi hai. Par agar akele mein rone ka mann bhi kare toh daba deta hoon, kyunki mard ko kamzor dikhne ki ijazat nahi hoti. Log kya kahenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue softly.
text: Apno se mazaak sunna aur andar hi andar akele is isolation mein apne aansu daba lena, kyunki society ek mard ko rone nahi deti...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Wahi toh dard hai. Main apne liye thodi ji raha hoon ab. Jo bhi kamata hoon, seedha gaon bhej deta hoon bimar maa-baap ki dawai ke liye. Mera badla hua svabhav shauk nahi, is shehar ki reality hai jisne mujhe machine bana diya hai. Mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai, warna wo sab wahan haar jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the core motivation behind his extreme endurance.
text: Itne dabaav aur akelepan ke beech jab thakan bohot zyada badh jati hai, tab lagatar kaam karte rehne ki ye himmat tumhe kis khayal se milti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas yahi khayal ki meri maa ka ilaj chalna chahiye aur papa ko dawai milti rahe. Aur gaon walon ki jo ummeed judi hai mujhse, wo kisi bhi keemat par tootni nahi chahiye. Main unhe mayoos nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of failing them.
text: Ek taraf parivaar ki umeed aur doosri taraf yeh darr laga rehta hai ki agar tumne thodi bhi kamzori dikhayi, toh gaon mein sab mayoos hokar apni himmat haar jayenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi. Par ab sach kahun toh andar se main bilkul khokhla feel kar raha hoon. Thakan is level pe hai ki lagta hai main sadak par hi gir padunga ek din.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk and reflect the deep exhaustion.
text: Lagta hai ki apne bimar maa-baap ke liye itni mehnat karte karte, andar se ek bohot gehari thakan aur helpless feeling baith gayi hai jo is dabaav mein ekdum swabhavik hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Helplessness hi toh hai. Na idhar ka raha na udhar ka. Gaon walon ke liye main badal gaya hoon, aur shehar walon ke liye main sirf ek bahar ka mazdoor hoon. Main sach mein poori tarah akela pad gaya hoon yahan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Culturally validate his isolation and structural sacrifice.
text: Jab poore gaon ki aakhri umeed tum par tiki ho aur tum din raat akele lagatar unke liye lad rahe ho, toh in anjaan sadko par itna akelapan mehsoos karna bohot laazmi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Laazmi toh hai, par seh paana bada mushkil ho raha hai ab. Din bhar ki shift, phir akele choti si kholi mein wapas aana. Mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai, par kabhi kabhi lagta hai ab chalne ki taqat bhi nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share systemic reality of migrant duty.
text: Apne parivaar ke liye is tarah apna sab kuch bhula kar ek anjaan shehar mein isolation jhelna bohot se migrant mardon mein common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin yahan koi izzat aur zimmedari ki wajah se apna dard bayan nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Yahan sab meri tarah hi ghoot rahe hain chup chap. Par ab mujhse aur nahi saha jata. Mujhe koi raasta batao ki main apna dimaag thoda shant kaise rakhu?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide small viable coping options matching his setting.
text: Is bhaari zimmedari ke beech, kuch choti cheezein tumhare liye kaam aa sakti hain. Ek toh din mein jab khana khate ho, tab 5 minute aaram se gehri saans le sakte ho bina kisi fikar ke, ya fir raat ko gaon ke kisi bohot achhe, purane pal ko yaad karke so sakte ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko achhi yaad sochne se toh aur udaasi hoti hai ki sab kho gaya. Saans lene wala tareeqa shayad thoda behtar rahe. Wo thoda shant karne mein madad kaise karega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the breathing exercise clearly.
text: Pehle jab aaj raat ko duty se wapas aao aur letne lago, toh aankh band karke 3 tak ginte hue lambi saans andar lena, aur phir 4 tak ginte hue dheere dheere use bahar chhodna... bas itna hi koshish karna aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Achha, 3 tak andar aur 4 tak bahar. Yeh rule laga kar shayad dimaag idhar-udhar thoda kam bhagega. Aksar raat ko paiso ki tension se neend nahi aati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize his struggle as a structural disaster issue, not a personal failing.
text: Hamesha yaad rakhna ki yeh structural endurance ki zaroorat tumhari koi personal failure nahi hai, balki us disaster jaisi emergency ne tumhare akele kandhon par ye itna bada aur un-natural burden daal diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, disaster ne toh zindagi palat di. Par main bas khud par hi sara bojh aur saari galti daal kar stress le raha tha. Aapki baat se ab thoda halka mehsoos ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his integration of self-care and duty.
text: Apne bimar maa baap ki itni fikar ke sath sath, ab tumne apni khud ki mental shanti ke liye bhi thodi si jagah banana shuru kiya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Jagah toh banani padegi. Agar main hi is stress se sach mein gir gaya, toh unko paisa aur dawai kaun bhejega. Isliye main aaj se hi wo saans lene wala kaam karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about how he feels planning this small relief.
text: Soch kar kaisa mehsoos ho raha hai ki sone se pehle ab tumhe akelepan mein pareshan hone ki bajaye, khud ke sukoon ke liye kuch pal mil payenge?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaafi behtar lag raha hai andar se. Ek chhota sa thehrav mil jaye dimaag ko toh main kal se phirse apni poori mehnat kar paunga bina tute.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his realization that self-care serves his duty.
text: Tumhe yeh baat ab behtar samajh aa rahi hai ki apne dimaag ko chhota sa aaram dena, apno ke liye tumhari lambi ladai mein tumhe aur mazboot banayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Pehle lagta tha ki agar main aaram karunga toh unhe dhokha de raha hoon. Par ab dikh raha hai ki bina fuel ke machine thodi chal sakti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his shift in perspective and his ongoing courage.
text: Sach mein yeh bohot himmat wali baat hai ki itne bhaari dabaav mein bhi tumne aaj apni aawaz suni aur apne insaan hone ko jagah di.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Shukriya aapka baat sunne ke liye. Mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai yeh main theek se janta hoon, par aaj aapne safar thoda aasaan kar diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his relief in having expressed his struggle.
text: Itne lambe struggle ke beech aaj tumne apne andar ke dukh ko lafzon mein dhal kar ek naya thehrav aur rahat mehsoos ki hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, lafzon mein dhaalne se hi aadhi ghabrahat door ho gayi. Andar ka zeher thoda bahar toh nikla kam se kam.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the renewed sense of balance.
text: Mujhe lagta hai ki ab aage ke liye tumhare andar ek alag si shanti aur ek naya balance aa gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Balance hona bohot zaroori tha. Kal se jab main site par jaunga, toh un baaton ko aur akelepan ko dil par nahi lagaunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his shift away from fear towards peace.
text: Apne farz ko nibhane ke is naye tareeqe se, us purane dar ki jagah ab is shanti ne le li hai ki tum apna raasta sahi se jante ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdam theek kaha. Mera iraada nek hai aur main jo kar raha hoon wo apne bimar parents ke liye hi hai. Ab main sone jaata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final warm closing affirmation.
text: Aaj ki is mulakat ne sach mein ek naya hausla dikhaya hai tumhare andar, jiske liye tumhara garv karna banta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapka bohot bohot shukriya. Main dhyaan rakhunga aage se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Open question inviting future connection.
text: Aage chalkar agar kabhi bhi akelapan zyada badh jaye, toh kya phir se isi tarah aakar apna dil halka karoge?
